name: desktop-pos-hybrid
description: Desktop POS with Hybrid Cloud Sync

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
